summary: Frontend-only testing of new MyProfilePage at /dashboard/profile. All 15 requested features verified end-to-end for both Game Mode (admin) and Focus Mode (test user). Equip icon flow tested both via UI (click Default → avatar shows initials; click Flame Emblem → avatar shows SVG) and via direct API PUT /api/profile/me/equip (null → 200, equipped_icon=None; key=icon_flame → 200, equipped_icon=icon_flame). Public profile at /profile/Admin6419 renders equipped items (Flame icon avatar on purple #8B5CF6 banner). Mobile responsive layout verified at 390x844 — stats row, accordions, and bottom-nav Profile tab all render correctly.

issues: Level badge still renders 'Level 4 -- Achiever' with double-dash separator — carry-over from iter_7/iter_8, cosmetic only. Consider '•' or en-dash.

design_issues.screen: MyProfilePage — equipped title section in live preview
issues: Admin has no equipped_title, so no title text renders under the name. Not a bug, but the Titles accordion shows '0' and the empty-state copy is fine.

passed_tests: Admin (Game Mode) login OK → redirects to /dashboard
Game Mode nav contains all 6 items: Home, Progress, Profile, Level, Shop, Settings
Focus Mode nav contains exactly 5 items: Home, Progress, Profile, Shop, Settings (no 'Level')
/dashboard/profile renders [data-testid=my-profile-page] for both admin and focus user
Preview banner background = rgb(139,92,246) (#8B5CF6) — matches user.selected_banner_color
Preview avatar background = rgb(59,130,246) (#3B82F6) — matches user.selected_main_color
Preview avatar renders Flame SVG icon (lucide Flame) when equipped_icon=icon_flame
Stats row shows XP=720, Streak=0, Best=7, Done=22 (data-testid=profile-stats-row with mini-stat-xp/streak/best/done)
'View public profile' share link present with href=/profile/Admin6419 (data-testid=share-profile-link)
All 4 Customize accordion sections visible: equip-titles, equip-icons, equip-anims, equip-banners
Icons accordion expands and shows 'Default' + 'Flame Emblem' pills (admin owns icon_flame)
UI equip flow: clicking 'Default' unequips icon → avatar switches to initials 'AU'
UI equip flow: clicking 'Flame Emblem' re-equips icon → avatar switches back to Flame SVG
API: PUT /api/profile/me/equip {type:'icon',key:null} → 200 {"message":"icon equipped","key":null}; GET /api/auth/me shows equipped_icon=None
API: PUT /api/profile/me/equip {type:'icon',key:'icon_flame'} → 200 {"message":"icon equipped","key":"icon_flame"}; GET /api/auth/me shows equipped_icon='icon_flame'
Public profile /profile/Admin6419 renders Flame-icon avatar, purple equipped banner, name, username, level badge, stats
Mobile (390x844): profile page visible, stats row visible, bottom-nav Profile tab present (focus user)
Focus user (Test User @Test1710, 235 XP, 3 streak, 5 best, 9 done) can view their own profile page correctly
action_items: (Cosmetic, carry-over) Fix 'Level 4 -- Achiever' double-dash separator on public profile level badge.
(Optional) In MyProfilePage live-preview, consider rendering the equipped_title slot even when none is equipped (grey placeholder) so users see where the title would appear before they earn one.
critical_code_review_comments: MyProfilePage.js (348 lines) is clean and well-structured with sub-components MiniStat/EquipSection/EquipPill.
ICON_MAP uses emoji key lookup (flame/star/diamond/etc.) to pick lucide icons — keep in sync with backend profile-items catalog.

handleEquip refetches both /api/profile/me/titles and /api/shop/profile-items after each equip. Consider only refetching what changed, or rely on refreshUser() + local state merge to reduce network chatter.
API PUT /api/profile/me/equip is already robust (accepts null to remove) and returns clear message payload. Verified via curl: 200 + correct state persistence in both directions.
No backend changes in this iteration (frontend-only feature). No new endpoints, no schema changes.

success_rate.backend: 100% (equip endpoint validated via curl both paths)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 15 requested features pass; 1 cosmetic carry-over nit)

seed_data_creation: None. Admin's equipped_icon was briefly toggled null → icon_flame during test; left as 'icon_flame' (original state).
context_for_next_testing_agent: MyProfilePage route /dashboard/profile works end-to-end for both modes. Key data-testids: my-profile-page, preview-banner, preview-avatar, profile-stats-row, share-profile-link, mini-stat-{xp|streak|best|done}, equip-titles, equip-icons, equip-anims, equip-banners, preview-title. Admin6419 has equipped_icon=icon_flame, selected_main_color=#3B82F6, selected_banner_color=#8B5CF6. Carry-over: 'Level N -- Name' double-dash separator on level badge across HomePage/PublicProfile.
